debug_info.goal:
ι : Type u_1
Ω : Type u_2
E : Type u_3
mΩ : MeasurableSpace Ω
P : Measure Ω
inst✝⁷ : LinearOrder ι
inst✝⁶ : OrderBot ι
𝓕 : Filtration ι mΩ
X : ι → Ω → E
inst✝⁵ : TopologicalSpace ι
inst✝⁴ : OrderTopology ι
inst✝³ : NormedAddCommGroup E
inst✝² : 𝓕.HasUsualConditions P
inst✝¹ : NormedSpace ℝ E
inst✝ : CompleteSpace E
hX :
  @ProbabilityTheory.Locally ι Ω E mΩ inst✝⁷ inst✝⁶ inst✝⁵ inst✝⁴
    SubtractionMonoid.toSubNegZeroMonoid.toNegZeroClass.toZero
    (fun X => ∀ (ω : Ω), Function.RightContinuous fun x => X x ω) 𝓕 X P
⊢ ∀ᵐ (ω : Ω) ∂P, Function.RightContinuous fun x => X x ω

proof:
filter_upwards [hX.IsLocalizingSequence.tendsto_top] with ω hω i
  rw [WithTop.tendsto_atTop_nhds_top_iff] at hω
  obtain ⟨N, hN⟩ := hω i
  have hi_lt : (i : WithTop ι) < hX.localSeq N ω := hN N le_rfl
  have hpos : ⊥ < hX.localSeq N ω := lt_of_le_of_lt bot_le hi_lt
  have hmem : ω ∈ {ω' | ⊥ < hX.localSeq N ω'} := hpos
  have hrc := hX.stoppedProcess N ω i
  refine hrc.congr_of_eventuallyEq ?_ ?_
  · rcases eq_or_ne (hX.localSeq N ω) ⊤ with htop | hne
    · filter_upwards with j
      rw [stoppedProcess_eq_of_le (htop ▸ le_top : (j : WithTop ι) ≤ _), Set.indicator_of_mem hmem]
    · obtain ⟨k, hk⟩ := WithTop.ne_top_iff_exists.mp hne
      have hi_lt' : i < k := WithTop.coe_lt_coe.mp (hk ▸ hi_lt)
      filter_upwards [mem_nhdsWithin_of_mem_nhds (Iio_mem_nhds hi_lt')] with j hj
      rw [stoppedProcess_eq_of_le (hk ▸ WithTop.coe_le_coe.mpr hj.le), Set.indicator_of_mem hmem]
  · rw [stoppedProcess_eq_of_le hi_lt.le, Set.indicator_of_mem hmem]
successful_attempts:
filter_upwards [hX.IsLocalizingSequence.tendsto_top] with ω hω i
  rw [WithTop.tendsto_atTop_nhds_top_iff] at hω
  obtain ⟨N, hN⟩ := hω i
  have hi_lt : (i : WithTop ι) < hX.localSeq N ω := hN N le_rfl
  have hpos : ⊥ < hX.localSeq N ω := lt_of_le_of_lt bot_le hi_lt
  have hmem : ω ∈ {ω' | ⊥ < hX.localSeq N ω'} := hpos
  have hrc := hX.stoppedProcess N ω i
  refine hrc.congr_of_eventuallyEq ?_ ?_
  · rcases eq_or_ne (hX.localSeq N ω) ⊤ with htop | hne
    · filter_upwards with j
      rw [stoppedProcess_eq_of_le (htop ▸ le_top : (j : WithTop ι) ≤ _), Set.indicator_of_mem hmem]
    · obtain ⟨k, hk⟩ := WithTop.ne_top_iff_exists.mp hne
      have hi_lt' : i < k := WithTop.coe_lt_coe.mp (hk ▸ hi_lt)
      filter_upwards [mem_nhdsWithin_of_mem_nhds (Iio_mem_nhds hi_lt')] with j hj
      rw [stoppedProcess_eq_of_le (hk ▸ WithTop.coe_le_coe.mpr hj.le), Set.indicator_of_mem hmem]
  · rw [stoppedProcess_eq_of_le hi_lt.le, Set.indicator_of_mem hmem]
